categories.description: A new invoice was created for you. Receipt-style notification with invoice number + amount + due date + PDF link. Fired only when the invoice module's settings.auto_send_on_finalize is enabled OR the admin manually sent the invoice.
Confirmation that the invoice email was delivered to your inbox. Includes invoice PDF link. Distinct from invoice.created — fires on every resend (including the initial send).
Your payment has been received. Includes invoice number, amount paid, payment method (last 4 of card / bank / check reference), and final balance. Admin also receives (confirms revenue booked).
Reminder that an invoice is coming due (3 days before + 1 day before). Includes amount due, due date, payment link. Suppressed for customers with auto-pay enabled.

Dunning reminder. Cadence: 1/7/14/30 days after due. Includes amount due, days past due, payment link, and progressively firmer copy. Compliance-note: the copy tone escalates per configured dunning schedule but never uses threatening language.
Admin notification. An invoice was marked uncollectible after the dunning ladder was exhausted (typically 90 days past due). Feeds the bad-debt write-off ledger review.

Compliance-sensitive. Both customer and admin receive notification when an invoice is handed off to a third-party collections agency. Customer copy names the agency + the customer's rights under FDCPA (US) / EU consumer credit directive. Enterprise-only feature.

A refund has been issued for one of your invoices. Includes original invoice, refund amount, credit note number + PDF link. Refund landing time depends on payment method (typically 3-10 business days).
A credit note has been issued against your invoice. Includes credit note number, amount, reason, and the applied_to target (refund / next invoice / customer balance). PDF attached.
Quarterly admin digest of invoices written off in the quarter. Includes count, total amount written off, top customers by write-off amount. Feeds accounting bad-debt expense review.
